creator: kai@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 194814
py-packageurl-python.patch

Hello,

attached is the patch that adds the Python package textproc/py-packageurl-python, an implementation of the "purl" (= package URL) specification. The library provides parsing and building of package URLs.


QA:
~~~
- poudriere (11.2-RELEASE amd64 + i386) for each py27 + py36 flavor -> OK
- portlint -> OK
